prompt: This navigation bar looks terrible — thick black border at the bottom, every nav item looks identical with the same font-weight, and the active page is only distinguished by a blue color change. The logo has no personality. Please refactor it to look like a modern app navigation. Read the file at /Users/zulthaqif/Documents/skills-workspace/refactoring-ui-workspace/iteration-3/eval-21-nav-refactor/input/bad-design.html and save the improved version as component.html

assertions.description: Logo/brand name has stronger visual presence — font-weight ≥ 600 or font-size larger than nav items
Active nav item has a font-weight that differs from inactive items (e.g., 600 vs 400) for non-color hierarchy
The '3px solid black' bottom border is removed or replaced with a subtle separator (1px, lighter color, or shadow)
